MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven H. Weinstein, Esq., of BARGER & WOLEN (213-614-7308), appearing for defendant / moving party California State Automobile Association Inter-Insurance Bureau
Ivo Labar, Esq., of KERR & WAGSTAFFE (415-371-8500) , appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Douglas Kirkwood

RULING:
DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION INTER-INSURANCE BUREAU'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant California State Automobile Association of Inter-Insurance Bureau's demurrer to second amended complaint is overruled with ten days to answer. The demurrer is based on a misreading of the second amended complaint (SAC). Contrary to the demurrer, the SAC does not allege that it is impermissible to consider age in determining depreciation, but merely alleges that age may not be the sole factor in determining depreciation. A plain reading of section 2051(b) shows that age is not the sole factor in determining depreciation under that section and thus plaintiff's first and second cause of action are not amenable to resolution by demurrer. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare an order according to the Court's ruling. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542 = (220/HEK)
